summary: US-842 integration release gate passed. Spexus current_context was read before the task and epic hierarchy. All exact dependency reports listed in the verifier prompt were present, valid JSON, matched the expected task/epic ids, and reported succeeded status. Current source/test inspection plus npm run verify confirmed fixed Sochi profile rules, UI legal-action binding, US-scoped integration coverage, component verification, accessibility review, desktop visual evidence, localStorage compatibility, and release readiness are mutually consistent for this static frontend/domain app. AC-2422 and AC-2423 have passing evidence. No backend, live API, auth, scope, server persistence, route wiring, or intercepted browser evidence applies.

tests_run.evidence: Vitest passed 11 files / 101 tests, including src/test/ruleFlow.integration.test.ts, src/domain/engine.test.ts, src/ui/render.test.ts, src/ui/controller.test.ts, and src/persistence/saveStore.test.ts. TypeScript compilation and Vite production build completed successfully.

node_package_scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run build

verification_environment.notes: No backend service, live API, authentication scope, middleware, route wiring, server persistence, database migration, or online multiplayer exists in the epic scope or source tree. Evidence is local domain/unit/integration/jsdom tests, source/report review, browser localStorage compatibility checks, and prior Vite-served desktop screenshot review.

quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Report review is not counted alone for runtime behavior; it was supplemented by current source/test inspection and npm run verify.

quality_gate_matrix.command_or_source: npm run verify; src/domain/engine.ts; src/domain/rules.ts; src/domain/engine.test.ts; src/domain/rules.test.ts; src/test/ruleFlow.integration.test.ts
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Evidence covers the fixed Sochi MVP profile, not configurable agreement variants or exact DOS emulation.

quality_gate_matrix.command_or_source: npm run verify; src/ui/render.ts; src/ui/render.test.ts; src/ui/controller.test.ts; src/test/ruleFlow.integration.test.ts; task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1141/attempt-1.json
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: UI projection is verified through jsdom renderer/controller tests and integration tests, not a manual end-to-end clickthrough of every phase.
quality_gate_matrix.accepted_risk: No blocking risk; prior visual browser fixtures supplement jsdom coverage for desktop presentation.

quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Local integration tests exercise domain state transitions and jsdom renderer projection. No backend/live API path exists for this app.
Component verification is for the single active Spexus default component and static local frontend/domain code.
The suite includes deterministic rule-flow integration and unit coverage, but not a full manual browser bullet playthrough. Full-bullet smoke breadth is also covered by adjacent US-846 scope.
quality_gate_matrix.accepted_risk: No blocking US-842 regression risk remains.

quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Evidence is source/jsdom review for native buttons, accessible labels, aria-pressed discard state, focus-visible styling, non-color-only affordance, and suppression of AI/finished controls. No external screen-reader session was run.
quality_gate_matrix.accepted_risk: No blocking accessibility risk remains for the desktop-first MVP gate.

quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Prior visual evidence covers deterministic 1280x800 desktop fixtures for bidding, whist decision, contract play, all-pass, misere, deal-settlement, and next-deal. Full mobile adaptation is explicitly out of MVP scope.
quality_gate_matrix.accepted_risk: Desktop-first visual coverage is acceptable for this release scope.

quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Compatibility evidence is for browser localStorage schema/state migration only. No database, DTO/API compatibility, seeded data, or rollback migration path exists.
quality_gate_matrix.accepted_risk: Legacy pre-rule-engine saves without bulletTarget default to bulletTarget 10 because the old payload did not carry that field; accepted as non-blocking in PERSONAL-TASK-1140.

quality_gate_matrix.command_or_source: PERSONAL-EP-180 scope; package.json; source inspection for network/API/auth usage
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: The app has no server, accounts, online multiplayer, authorization, tenant/project scope, live API mutation path, sensitive data flow, or backend validation surface.
quality_gate_matrix.accepted_risk: No security gate applies beyond local static-app behavior.

quality_gate_matrix.command_or_source: PERSONAL-EP-180 desktop-first static browser scope; source inspection
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: No production logging, metrics, tracing, backend operators, or service health surface is in MVP scope.
quality_gate_matrix.accepted_risk: No observability requirement applies to this local static rules-engine release gate.

quality_gate_matrix.command_or_source: npm run verify; dependency reports PERSONAL-TASK-1139 through PERSONAL-TASK-1145; Spexus PERSONAL-US-842 hierarchy
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: No feature flag, server rollback, or live deployment smoke path exists for the static local MVP. Release readiness is based on green project verify, current source/test consistency, dependency evidence, and documented scope limits.
quality_gate_matrix.accepted_risk: Static app release has no server rollback path; green production build is acceptable for this component release gate.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Fixed Sochi MVP profile decisions trace to reverse-engineering evidence and explicit product interpretation
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: Spexus epic hierarchy for PERSONAL-EP-180; docs/test-design/us-842-rule-phases.md; task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1139/attempt-1.json; task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1145/attempt-1.json
evidence_matrix.limitations: The release target is classic Sochi preference under the fixed MVP agreement profile, not exact DOS emulation.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Enforce fixed agreement profile: six spades does not require mandatory whist, ten-level games are checked, whist is half-responsible, all-pass scoring is progressive, and all-pass exits by a six-level game
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: npm run verify; src/domain/engine.test.ts; src/test/ruleFlow.integration.test.ts; src/domain/scoring.test.ts; task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1140/attempt-2.json; task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1142/attempt-1.json
evidence_matrix.limitations: Local deterministic integration/unit tests prove the fixed MVP profile; no backend or live path applies.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Supported phases end to end: bidding, all-pass, contract ordering, widow pickup, discard, whist/check/half-whist/pass, trick play, misere, deal settlement, next-deal transition, and bullet completion
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: npm run verify; src/test/ruleFlow.integration.test.ts; src/domain/engine.test.ts; src/ui/render.test.ts
evidence_matrix.limitations: Evidence uses representative deterministic local flows plus broader unit coverage. Full mobile adaptation and exact original AI reconstruction are out of US-842 scope.

evidence_matrix.scenario: When a third card completes a trick, determine trick winner, update trick counts, clear current trick, and assign next lead to the trick winner
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: npm run verify; src/test/ruleFlow.integration.test.ts; src/domain/engine.test.ts; src/domain/engine.ts
evidence_matrix.limitations: Trick winner evidence is deterministic local rules-engine execution with fixed card fixtures.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Given any supported game phase, when the player attempts to act, the UI exposes only legal actions for the fixed Sochi MVP profile
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: npm run verify; src/test/ruleFlow.integration.test.ts; src/ui/render.test.ts; src/ui/controller.test.ts; task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1141/attempt-1.json; task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1143/attempt-1.json
evidence_matrix.limitations: Legal-action binding is verified through getLegalActions/applyAction plus jsdom renderer/controller tests and prior desktop screenshots, not through a live backend/browser API path.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Given three cards have been played to a trick, the rules engine records the trick winner, updates trick counts, clears the trick, and makes the winner the next leader
evidence_matrix.limitations: Covered by local deterministic state assertions; no network/live runtime applies.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Classify mocked, backend, auth, scope, persistence, route wiring, and live-browser applicability for this local frontend/domain app
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: PERSONAL-EP-180 scope; package.json; rg source inspection for fetch/page.route/route.fulfill/MSW; task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1144/attempt-1.json
evidence_matrix.limitations: No backend, live API, auth, scope headers, server persistence, route wiring, page.route interception, route.fulfill, MSW, fetch, or XMLHttpRequest usage was found in the app source. Prior visual evidence used Vite-served fixtures importing production renderer/styles and is accepted only as visual_review, not backend/live evidence.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Confirm rule implementation, UI binding, integration tests, component verification, accessibility, visual checks, compatibility, regression, and release readiness are complete and mutually consistent
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: npm run verify; all listed dependency reports; current source/test inspection
evidence_matrix.limitations: Release readiness is scoped to the static Vite/web build and localStorage MVP. No server deployment smoke, rollback, auth, or database migration gate applies.
